purpose: Shared-runner or explicit local-fallback regression smoke test (30s per scenario default)
gating_policy: static-http1 >= 250 req/s, proxy-http1 >= 100 req/s, keepalive >= 250 req/s, zero non-2xx errors, p99 <= 250 ms
driver_notes: Loopback run on a shared GitHub Actions runner or an explicitly requested local fallback; longer than the original 5s smoke to reduce tail-latency noise while still catching obvious regressions.
